name: Zerodha Trade Symbol Analyzer
scenario: Zerodha receives 10M daily trade events keyed by stock symbol strings. Build a frequency analysis engine that groups similar symbols, detects anagram pairs, and finds minimum-window patterns in event logs.

core.description: isAnagram(String s, String t): O(n) O(1) int[26]. Test: ('anagram','nagaram')→true, ('rat','car')→true, ('hello','world')→false.
groupAnagrams(String[] symbols): HashMap with sorted-char key. Test: ['eat','tea','tan','ate','nat','bat'] → 3 groups.
findAllAnagramPositions(String log, String pattern): fixed sliding window int[26]. Test: ('cbaebabacd','abc')→[0,6].
minWindowContainingAll(String s, String t): O(n) required-counter approach. Test: ('ADOBECODEBANC','ABC')→'BANC'.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): isAnagram=true, groups=3, anagramPositions=[0,6], minWindow='BANC'. All pass.
README: explains O(n×m) vs O(n×m log m) anagram key and when each is appropriate.

bonus.description: topKFrequentSymbols(String[] symbols, int k): HashMap + min-heap of size k. O(n log k). Sorted by freq desc, lex asc for ties.
longestKDistinctSubstring(String s, int k): variable window HashMap. O(n). Test: ('eceba',2)→3.
minStepsToAnagram(String s, String t): count surplus chars. O(n) O(1). Test: ('bab','aab')→1.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. int[26]: freq[c-'a']++ for counting. isAnagram: early exit length check. Anagram key (sort): toCharArray() → Arrays.sort() → new String(chars). Anagram key (freq O(n×m)): build int[26], encode as '#'-separated string. findAllAnagrams: fixed window — build first window of size p.length(), then slide by adding chars[i] and removing chars[i-p.length()]. Arrays.equals(need,have): O(26)=O(1) comparison. minWindow: use 'required' counter — decrements when a needed char is present enough times (not just any time), increments when left pointer removes a needed char.
